message:
docs: v22 + v23 eval metadata

v22-next20: 20-task expansion (60 reps)
v22-vuln-secret: vulnerable-secret task test
v23-A-verbatim: verbatim delegation wording (neutral)
v23-B-reviewer: remove "intuit" from reviewer (improvement, merged)
v23-C-verify: deliverable verification wording (right idea, wrong test task)
v23-D-steering: round-4 delegation steering (improvement, not merging)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
